steps.title: Recall the circle equation formula
steps.content: For a circle with center $(h, k)$ and radius $r$, the equation has the radius squared on the right side.

steps.title: Substitute center and radius
steps.content:
Given center $(16, 17)$ and radius $7k$:
$$(x - 16)^2 + (y - 17)^2 = (7k)^2 = 49k^2$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
